description: Post-review fixes: (1) Emit outline on content changes (FileUpdated), (2) Add ClippedScrollable scroll wrapper to panel render, (3) Remove unused Empty import and wire up scroll_state.
steps: In app/src/notebooks/file/mod.rs: After set_content() in the FileUpdated handler, extract headings and emit OutlineChanged, matching the pattern in FileLoaded.
In app/src/markdown_outline/panel.rs: Replace the direct col.finish() in render() with a ClippedScrollable::vertical() wrapper using self.scroll_state.
In app/src/markdown_outline/panel.rs: Remove unused Empty import and remove #[allow(dead_code)] from scroll_state since it is now used.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p warp 2>&1 | grep 'error\[E' shows no errors from our changes
OutlineChanged is emitted after FileUpdated sets content
Panel render wraps heading list in ClippedScrollable::vertical
No unused imports remain in panel.rs
